     The Numbers Business Report

Traitor (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,530,831Details
International Box Office $4,351,395
Worldwide Box Office $27,882,226
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,041,559
Total $14,041,559
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When straight-arrow agent Roy Clayton assumes command of a special FBI task force, he becomes entangled in a web of covert operations. All the clues in Clayton’s investigation point to Samir Horn, a former Special Ops soldier who now aids terrorists. But as Clayton digs deeper and contradictory evidence begins to emerge, he begins to question Horn’s motives.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,868,465 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:84.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$22,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,054 opening theaters/2,108 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $39,196,209

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 27th, 2008 (Wide) by Overture Films
Video Release: December 19th, 2008 by Starz / Anchor Bay
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense violent sequences, thematic material and brief language.
Running Time: 114 minutes
Plot point: FBI, Muslims, Secret Agent, Suicide Bomber, Terrorism, Undercover
Subgenre: Political Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Overture Films, Mandeville Films, Hyde Park Entertainment, Crescendo Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
